description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house with a fenced yard, multiple trees, and a variety of outdoor amenities. The house features a complex roofline with both gable and hip elements, and its exterior is primarily composed of brick and wood paneling. The property includes a driveway, a garage, a swimming pool, a circular hot tub, and landscaped garden areas. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows and bay windows visible. The main entryway is prominent, featuring a set of steps, a covered porch, and double doors. The overall design blends contemporary and traditional residential architectural elements, creating a visually appealing and functional family home.
description: A spacious, modern brick house with a fenced yard, pool, hot tub, and landscaped gardens. The home features a complex roof, large windows, and a prominent entryway with a covered porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, pool, hot tub, and landscaped front yard with trees and fencing.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, garden areas, and the back side of the house with less window detail and more fencing visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the driveway, garage, and the side facade with symmetrical window placement and access to the main entry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, pool, hot tub, and the arrangement of trees and garden features along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture and bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent double-door entry with steps, covered porch, and decorative columns
